name: slopornot
description: Slop or Not tools for AI humanization, voice matching, local AI text detection, AI image detection, readability analysis, and Text Cleanup for Codex, Claude, Hermes Agent, and OpenClaw.

interface.shortDescription: AI humanization plus optional local Slop checks.
interface.longDescription: Bundle Slop or Not assistant skills for AI humanization, voice matching, local AI text detection, AI image detection, readability analysis, and Text Cleanup across Codex, Claude, Hermes Agent, OpenClaw, and other agents. Agentic Humanizer works without Slop or Not for core rewriting; Slop or Not Pro adds local scoring and cleanup stats. Slop Check uses the local Pro tools directly.
defaultPrompt: Humanize this draft with Agentic Humanizer.
Humanize this draft with local Slop or Not scoring.
Rewrite this text for a high school reading level.
Check this text with a local AI detector.
Is this image AI generated? Check it on-device.
What is the reading grade of this text?
